summary: Code quality refactoring verification complete. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working after refactoring: App.js reduced from 328→166 lines, AppSidebar.jsx extracted (98 lines), XSS fix in ReorderPage (no innerHTML), empty catch blocks fixed, nested ternaries replaced with explicit conditionals.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality refactoring verified. Key changes: (1) App.js reduced from 328→166 lines with AppSidebar.jsx extracted (98 lines). (2) XSS fix in ReorderPage.jsx - printPO now uses DOM methods instead of innerHTML. (3) Empty catch blocks replaced with console.warn. (4) Nested ternaries in AlertsPage/DashboardCalendar/Products replaced with explicit conditionals. (5) Backend: _tally_product_sales and _rank_products extracted from get_sales_top_items. All features working: Dashboard 5 KPIs, Alert bell, Sidebar navigation, Sales Dashboard, Market Mode POS, Allocation Tool, Scale Planner, Alerts page with dismiss buttons, Auto-Reorder page, Products page.
